params.name: Dictionnaire Infernal
params.description:
On Nov 26, 1818 AD, the first edition of Dictionnaire Infernal was officially published.
The Dictionary of Infernal was created by a French journalist named Jacques Auguste Simon Collin de Plancy. Although lacking in academic value due to the author's limited knowledge of the subject matter, the book is still of great interest due to his rich imagination and the illustrations added in later editions. The depiction of hell in the book has an administrative structure similar to human society, c …
